title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: A video presents five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agent systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise queries, multi-agent validation for response checking, symbolic guardians as Python-based rules, and runtime guardrails for self-correction. AWS Bedrock AgentCore is shown as a production platform implementing these approaches at scale.
